name: HMS ML 215 (ML 215)
events: 19 Feb 1944 HMS H 50 (T/Lt. A.F. Wicker, RNVR) departed Sheerness for Portsmouth. She was escorted by FFS Chasseur 10 until 1600 hours when HMS ML 215 (T/Lt. A.M.S. Aird, RNVR) took over. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
